title: National Housing Shortage
description: Housing demand surges while construction lags, driving prices to record highs.

B.title: Relax zoning laws to allow more building

C.title: Implement rent caps to stabilize prices

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Relaxing zoning laws empowers communities and increases freedom in development.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Subsidies ensure construction actually happens instead of relying on market optimism.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Rent caps distort the market and discourage new building.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: But without intervention, prices will keep rising faster than wages.
